KD not frozen-encoder: student = fold-local Ridge/small MLP; loss = α·MSE(student_pred,y) + β·MSE(student_intermediate, teacher_intermediate); α/β fixed in pre-reg; teacher intermediate enters as forced-include feature column to fold-local LGB/Ridge
